prose:
Frontier-orbital analysis of aniline (14 atoms: N, C×6, H×7) computed at DFT, tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied aniline.xyz used as-is (single-point; no re-optimization). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run). Integrity verdict: trustworthy = true.

Results:
  HOMO−2 (index 22): −8.4041702 eV
  HOMO−1 (index 23): −6.8461949 eV
  HOMO   (index 24): −5.553772 eV
  LUMO   (index 25): −0.2489544 eV
  LUMO+1 (index 26): +0.30750756 eV
  LUMO+2 (index 27): +0.77617648 eV

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 5.553772 eV, vertical EA = 0.2489544 eV, electronegativity χ = 2.9013632 eV, chemical hardness η = 2.6524088 eV, softness S = 0.37701579 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index ω = 1.5868422 eV.

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
Output file: aniline_frontier_dft.json
